color: Tone-on-tone is safest and most elevated
silhouette: Balance loose top with fitted bottom or vice versa
Long tops pair with slim pants
material: Avoid same fabric top and bottom
Exception: raw denim full set allowed if tone is consistent
Formal fabrics do not mix with casual cotton tees
occasion: Formal: no prints, no sportswear fabrics
Casual: mixing allowed but maintain overall coherence
Formality level must be consistent across all pieces

layering: Spring: thin blazer or vest as third layer
Summer: use structural cuts instead of volume layering
Linen should be structured, not slouchy
occasion_weight: Q2: increase casual and date occasion weight
Formal: prefer light blazer over heavy suiting
